rationale: Exploit Novaris's military advantage and enemy domestic unrest to degrade Tethyan frontline capabilities and pressure their weakening morale.
Reinforce battlefield dominance through visible troop deployments and aerial demonstrations to deter Tethyan counteroffensives during their internal instability.
Coordinate with intelligence to disrupt supply lines in contested zones, capitalizing on reduced enemy coordination amid protests.
Counter the backfired propaganda by seeding narratives within Novaris that amplify anti-war sentiment and erode public support for continued occupation.
Disrupt Tethyan command-and-control systems to exploit the current stalemate and gain battlefield information superiority.
Isolate and neutralize key Tethyan military leaders coordinating resistance, leveraging intelligence gains from fractured information environments.
With sanctions at 65%, prioritize securing critical resources to insulate Novaris’s war economy from further external shocks and sustain long-term operations.
Engage non-aligned nations to secure alternative trade routes, mitigating sanction pressure and exploiting commodity price shifts to our advantage.
Issue war bonds to bolster domestic economic resilience, ensuring sustained funding for military and intelligence operations without triggering inflationary collapse.
Novaris is stretched thin and reeling from domestic unrest, so a precision strike can exploit their weakened command cohesion and degrade frontline capabilities without triggering escalation.
Conducting visible military exercises near the frontlines will boost domestic morale and signal resilience to both our population and international observers.
Given the stalemate, increasing reconnaissance and patrol density will prevent surprise maneuvers and gather real-time battlefield intelligence.
With Novaris’s propaganda credibility damaged, we can amplify internal divisions by seeding false narratives among discontented military units and protest circles.
Target logistics coordination systems to exacerbate supply line strains confirmed by our intelligence, further degrading their operational tempo.
Identify and neutralize key mid-level commanders via covert means to increase command friction amid their current domestic instability.
With international support for Tethys below 50%, we must leverage the propaganda backfire and Novaris’s unrest through discreet outreach to key swing states to build diplomatic momentum.
Launch a transparency campaign showcasing Novaris’s territorial violations and domestic dissent to boost our moral standing and erode global neutrality toward the conflict.
Use the current diplomatic opening to form a working group on sanctions enforcement and information integrity, strengthening long-term alignment.
With sanctions at 65% and munitions reserves down to 42 days, we must prioritize securing critical inputs for defense production before supply chains further deteriorate.
Negotiate preferential access to rare minerals and energy in exchange for agricultural exports to insulate our economy from external shocks.
Issue emergency war bonds to fund defense spending domestically, reducing reliance on fragile foreign financial aid amid weakening international support.
